subject: english
description: 形容詞・副詞に -est をつけて「最も〜だ」という最上級を作ります。

questions.question: I am the ___ in the class. (tall)
questions.explanation: 短い形容詞の最上級は the -est です

questions.question: I am the ___ in the class. (big)
questions.explanation: 短母音+子音字で終わる語は子音字を重ねて -est をつけます

questions.question: I am the ___ to talk to in the class. (easy)
questions.explanation: 子音+yで終わる語は、yをiに変えて -est をつけます

questions.question: This game is the ___ of all. (interesting)
questions.explanation: 長い形容詞の最上級は the most + 形容詞です

questions.question: This problem is the ___ of all. (difficult)
questions.explanation: 長い形容詞の最上級は the most + 形容詞です

questions.question: This flower is the ___ of all. (beautiful)
questions.explanation: 長い形容詞の最上級は the most + 形容詞です

questions.question: Mt. Fuji is the ___ mountain in Japan. (high)
questions.explanation: 短い形容詞の最上級は the -est です

questions.question: This is the ___ book I have ever read. (good)
questions.explanation: goodの最上級は best です（不規則変化）
